channel.title: Noticias Forex — Global Investing
channel.description: Noticias forex de alto impacto en tiempo real con análisis fundamental para las 8 divisas G8.

item.title: WTI climbs above $99.00 as Middle East tensions escalate, Trump threatens Iran over Strait of Hormuz
item.description: West Texas Intermediate (WTI), the US crude oil benchmark, is trading around $99.10 during the early European trading hours on Monday. The WTI price jumps amid an escalating conflict in the Middle East. Fuente: FXStreet

item.title: USD/JPY Price Forecast: Approaches 160.00 as US Dollar gains amid Middle East war
item.description: The USD/JPY pair trades 0.22% higher to near 159.60 during the European trading session on Monday. The pair gains as the US Dollar (USD) trades firmly amid firm demand for safe-haven assets, in the wake of the war in the Middle East. Fuente: FXStreet

item.title: Euro: PMIs to show how Oil shock is affecting prices – Societe Generale
item.description: Societe Generale’s macro team highlights that March flash PMIs will be the first key read on how the recent Oil shock is affecting Euro area activity and prices. Fuente: FXStreet

item.title: Precious metals continue to bleed out as US-Iran conflict stirs up negative trifecta
item.description: Gold is down another 4% today as it closes in on $4,300 while silver is down 6% on the day as nears $64. It's starting to get rough out there as precious metals are hit by a trifecta of negative factors. The US-Iran conflict might have seemed like a good reason for precious metals to gain on geopolitical tensions. That was the case in January amid ... Fuente: InvestingLive

item.title: EUR/USD: Volatility signals questioned after energy shock – Commerzbank
item.description: Commerzbank’s Thu Lan Nguyen argues that despite what is described as the greatest threat to energy security in history, implied EUR/USD volatility remains unusually low. Fuente: FXStreet

item.title: FX option expiries for 23 March 10am New York cut
item.description: There aren't any major expiries to take note of for the day, with the full list seen below. There is a large-ish one for EUR/USD at the 1.1600 mark but it likely won't factor much into play. That as the broader market sentiment right now is more focused on inflation fears as the Middle East conflict looks set to drag on further. US president Trump ... Fuente: InvestingLive

item.title: USD/CHF gathers strength to near 0.7990 on Fed hawkish tone
item.description: The USD/CHF pair gathers strength to near 0.7890 during the early European session on Monday. A hawkish hold from the US Federal Reserve (Fed) provides some support to the US Dollar (USD) against the Swiss Franc (CHF). Traders will closely monitor the situation in the Middle East. Fuente: FXStreet

item.title: Yields continue to soar higher as inflation fears permeate across markets
item.description: It's a brand new week but the main focus in markets stay on the Middle East. The US-Iran conflict drags on further and the latest development is that US president Trump delivered a warning over the weekend for Iran to "reopen" the Strait of Hormuz. Trump gave a 48-hour ultimatum, which will run its course late in the day today. Iran has so far resp... Fuente: ForexLive

item.title: NZD/USD Price Forecast: Bears dominate below 200-SMA barrier near 0.5865-0.5870
item.description: The NZD/USD pair attracts sellers for the second straight day and slides back closer to the 0.5800 mark during the Asian session on Monday. Moreover, the broader fundamental backdrop and technical setup suggest that the path of least resistance for spot prices remains to the downside. Fuente: FXStreet

item.title: US Dollar Index edges higher above 99.50 on Middle East tensions, hawkish Fed
item.description: The US Dollar Index (DXY), an index of the value of the US Dollar (USD) measured against a basket of six world currencies, currently trades near 99.65 during the early European trading hours on Monday. Fuente: FXStreet

item.title: investingLive Asia-Pacific news wrap: Trump's 48 hour ultimatum. Iran warns of retaliation
item.description: Warsh faces turbulent Fed transition as inflation, politics and oil shock collide. Japan weighs cutting inflation-linked bond buybacks as demand rises ICYMI: Fitch sees Brent at $120 if Hormuz closure persists in 2026 IEA warns Middle East crisis worse than 1970s oil shocks, eyes stock releases Saudi Aramco cuts Asia oil supply as Hormuz disruption... Fuente: ForexLive

item.title: USD/CAD Price Forecast: Tests 1.3700 support near moving averages
item.description: USD/CAD continues to lose ground for the second successive session, trading around 1.3710 during the Asian hours on Monday. Fuente: FXStreet

item.title: Warsh faces turbulent Fed transition as inflation, politics and oil shock collide.
item.description: Warsh’s potential Fed leadership comes at a uniquely difficult moment, with rising inflation, political pressure, and transition uncertainty complicating the policy outlook. Info comes via the Wall Street Journal, gated . Summary: Kevin Warsh faces unusually complex Fed leadership transition Confirmation stalled amid political dispute over Powell p... Fuente: ForexLive

item.title: Japan weighs cutting inflation-linked bond buybacks as demand rises
item.description: Japan’s potential reduction in inflation-linked bond buybacks reflects rising inflation expectations and stronger demand, signalling a tentative shift away from its deflationary past. Summary: Japan considering reducing buybacks of inflation-linked bonds Move driven by rising investor demand amid higher inflation expectations Break-even inflation r... Fuente: ForexLive

item.title: EUR/USD Weekly Forecast: Iran war to keep shaping the market’s sentiment
item.description: The EUR/USD pair bounced back in the last few days, settling for the week around 1.1530. The Iran war and central banks’ monetary policy announcements took centre stage, yet none was enough to impress speculative interest. Fuente: FXStreet

item.title: GBP/USD Weekly Forecast: Pound tests 200-day SMA as hawkish BoE fuels recovery
item.description: The Pound Sterling (GBP) staged a late rebound from near three-month lows against the US Dollar (USD), testing the critical 1.3440 supply zone. Fuente: FXStreet

item.title: Gold Weekly Forecast: Energy prices, Fed commentary to continue to drive action
item.description: Gold (XAU/USD) extended its slide into a third consecutive week and lost more than 6%, its worst weekly performance since March 2020, as major central banks adopted a hawkish tone because of the upside risks to inflation posed by rising energy prices. Fuente: FXStreet

item.title: IEA warns Middle East crisis worse than 1970s oil shocks, eyes stock releases
item.description: IEA warns crisis worse than 1970s shocks as Hormuz disruption drives global energy strain. Summary: IEA warns Middle East crisis is “severe” and escalating Birol says situation worse than both 1970s oil crises combined Reopening Strait of Hormuz seen as the single biggest solution IEA consulting governments on potential further strategic oil releas... Fuente: InvestingLive

item.title: AUD/USD Price Forecast: Bears have the upper hand near 0.7000; 200-EMA breakdown in play
item.description: The AUD/USD pair opened with a modest bearish gap on Monday and touched a one-week low during the Asian session, though it lacked follow-through selling. Spot prices currently trade around the 0.7000 psychological mark, down 0.25% for the day, Fuente: FXStreet

item.title: Japan flags FX intervention risk. Oil shock drives yen volatility and policy response.
item.description: Japan ramps up FX warnings as oil-driven volatility pressures the yen, with authorities signalling readiness to intervene while also deploying fiscal support to offset rising energy costs. Summary: Japan signals readiness to act against FX volatility Top currency diplomat Mimura flags impact of oil-driven speculation on FX Comments reinforce concer... Fuente: InvestingLive

item.title: UK calls emergency COBRA meeting as Iran war lifts inflation and gilt yields
item.description: Bearish for UK bonds (higher yields) and negative for growth outlook; supports inflation expectations and hawkish BoE repricing, with spillover risk to global fixed income markets. Summary: UK PM Starmer convenes emergency “COBRA” meeting on Iran war fallout Finance minister Reeves and BoE Governor Bailey to attend Focus on energy security, inflati... Fuente: ForexLive

item.title: CBN wins global central banking award for policy reforms
item.description: The Central Bank of Nigeria (CBN) wins the global Central Bank of the Year award for its sweeping policy reforms that stabilized the economy and restored i Read More: https://punchng.com/cbn-wins-global-central-banking-award-for-policy-reforms/ Fuente: NewsData EUR

item.title: Key Market Events For The Week Of March 2327, 2026
item.description: (MENAFN - The Rio Times) Week Overview Markets digest last week's central bank cascade - the Copom's 25 bps cut to 14.75%, the Fed hold at 3.50–3.75% with an unchanged dot plot, and the ... Fuente: NewsData EUR

item.title: Asia week ahead: Japanese inflation and South Korean sentiment data
item.description: Japan: CPI expected to cool further Consumer price inflation is expected to slow further in February, primarily due to the government’s energy subsidy. It’s likely to show that the deceleration in inflation we saw before the Middle East crisis persisted. Yet core-core inflation is expected to stay well above 2.0%. Higher energy prices are likely ..... Fuente: NewsData JPY

item.title: War in the Middle East accelerates away from the off-ramp
item.description: Threats and counter-threats of irrevocable action have markets on edge, and consumers saving their pennies to spend on higher fuel costs for the foreseeable. Fuente: NewsData EUR

item.title: Home building industry facing COVID-like price spikes due to Middle East war
item.description: From sand to concrete, suppliers are bringing in "emergency fuel levies" as petrol prices soar due to the war in the Middle East. Major companies that supply pipes for plumbing are even warning of shortages. Fuente: NewsData AUD

item.title: AFL Origin, Valentine’s Day a one-off spending sugar hit as Middle East conflict adds to cost-of-living crisis
item.description: West Aussies reached for their wallets at the AFL Origin and during Valentine’s Day in February, but one expert warns it’s a one-off spending sugar hit as the US-Iran war adds to the cost-of-living crisis. Fuente: NewsData AUD

item.title: The 2 sectors Regal is betting on to ride out the tech wreck
item.description: Regal’s head of fundamental research Mark Nathan talks war, the oil shock and the beaten up stocks he has been buying that he says are safe from AI disruption. Fuente: NewsData AUD

item.title: Keir Starmer sets emergency COBR meeting for next week over cost of living
item.description: Prime Minister Keir Starmer is expected to chair an emergency COBR meeting this week with top ministers on the cost of living crisis as Iran tensions threaten oil supplies and energy prices Fuente: NewsData GBP

item.title: Keir Starmer in crisis cost-of-living summit as Ministers try to prevent panic-buying
item.description: The Prime Minister will convene Government colleagues and experts, following warnings that prices of petrol and food will rise due to the Iran war. Fuente: NewsData GBP
